title: Operations Control & Warehouse Readiness Coordinator
description:
We are hiring an Operations Control & Warehouse Readiness Coordinator to ensure warehouse operations, equipment readiness, and crew scheduling are carried out in a structured, rule-based, and predictable manner.

This role focuses on coordination, verification, and control, not physical warehouse work or event execution.

You will assign tasks, verify completion, control crew and driver work hours, and release or block jobs based on defined operational rules.


Key Responsibilities

Warehouse Task Coordination

  • Assign warehouse tasks to execution staff (e.g. equipment movement, packing, tidying)

  • Set clear task scope and completion timelines

  • Monitor progress and flag delays early

  • Ensure warehouse areas remain orderly and ready for operations

    Equipment Readiness Verification

    Verify that required equipment checks and packing have been completed by execution staff

    Confirm completion through checklists or system records

    Enforce equipment readiness states:

    • AVAILABLE

    • PREPPING

    • ON RENT

    • QUARANTINED

    Block release of equipment that is not verified as ready

    Enforce quarantine for faulty or incomplete items

    Crew & Driver Scheduling

    • Assign crew and driver start and end times using predefined shift templates

    • Ensure compliance with legal working hour and rest requirements

    • Lock schedules once confirmed

    • Prevent informal or unauthorised schedule changes

    Scheduling Enforcement (Simple Jobs)

    • Apply standard scheduling templates for simple delivery and setup jobs

    • Ensure simple jobs do not require project manager involvement

    • Escalate when job scope exceeds predefined “simple job” rules

    Operational Control & Escalation

    • Enforce SOPs and checklists consistently

    • Maintain accurate inventory and scheduling data

    • Reject verbal overrides and informal exceptions

    • Escalate risks early instead of resolving issues at the last minute

    Requirements

    Experience

    • Experience in logistics coordination, warehouse operations, scheduling, or operations control

    • Experience in event logistics or equipment rental operations is an advantage

    Skills & Attributes

    Strong attention to detail

    Comfortable working with rules, checklists, and structured processes

    Able to enforce procedures consistently

    Calm under pressure and able to block work when requirements are not met

    Organised, methodical, and process-driven


    This Role Is Not Suitable If You

    Enjoy improvisation or last-minute problem solving

    Are uncomfortable enforcing rules


    Working Hours

    • Standard full-time hours

    • Occasional extended hours during peak operational periods (within legal limits)

    About Us

    We are a growing AV equipment rental and event support company serving corporate and professional clients in Singapore. Our operations prioritise reliability, discipline, and predictability.

postedCompany.description:
Motion Media Works is a Singapore-based audio-visual and event technology company specialising in corporate events, conferences, exhibitions, and trade shows. We provide professional AV solutions including LED walls, sound systems, display systems, and on-site technical support.

Our team supports a wide range of events, from corporate meetings to large-scale exhibitions, working closely with clients, venues, and event partners to deliver reliable, high-quality technical execution. We operate in fast-paced live environments where precision, teamwork, and accountability are critical.

We are a hands-on, technically driven company that places strong emphasis on proper setup standards, safety, and operational discipline. Team members gain real-world exposure to professional AV systems and live event workflows, with opportunities to develop into senior technical and leadership roles.
postedCompany.name: MOTION MEDIA WORKS
